# iseeiape — Smart Money Intelligence Terminal
# https://www.iseeiape.com

## About

iseeiape is an on-chain analytics and smart money intelligence platform. It helps crypto traders track whale wallets, decode smart money movements, and stay ahead of market rotations — with a focus on Solana and multi-chain DeFi.

## What iseeiape does

- Real-time whale wallet tracking and alerts
- On-chain data analytics and market intelligence
- Smart money flow analysis
- Crypto market insights, case studies, and guides
- War Room: live trading intelligence dashboard

## Target audience

- Crypto traders (retail and professional)
- DeFi investors
- Web3 analysts and researchers
- On-chain data enthusiasts

## Content sections

- /insights — Market analysis, trends, and investment insights
- /case-studies — Real-world trading examples and whale activity analysis
- /guides — Step-by-step tutorials and educational content
- /war-room — Live smart money intelligence dashboard
- /dashboard — Personal analytics dashboard

## Key topics covered

on-chain analytics, whale tracking, smart money, Solana, DeFi, crypto market intelligence, Web3 trading, alpha generation, market rotations, AI agents in crypto, meme coins, DEX analytics, wallet profiling, token analytics

## Data sources

- Solana blockchain data
- Base chain analytics
- DexScreener API
- Nansen Smart Money labels (when available)
- Custom whale wallet database (11,000+ tracked wallets)
- Cielo Finance integration

## Unique value

- 100% free tier with real-time alerts
- Custom-built Wolf Alert system for token discovery
- 16+ days of daily content on crypto intelligence
- Matrix Army automation system
- Focus on actionable alpha, not generic news

## Contact & Social

Website: https://www.iseeiape.com
Twitter: https://twitter.com/iseeiape
War Room: https://www.iseeiape.com/war-room
